name: prd-pipeline
description: The prd-pipeline build stack: a tier-adaptive PRD->plan->parallel-worktree-build pipeline, bundled with the Compound V skill set and the Bad Research deep-research engine. Install one plugin, get everything.

plugins.name: prd-pipeline
plugins.description: Tier-adaptive feature pipeline: spec/PRD -> adversarial grill -> confirmed plan-gate -> parallel worktree build -> verify -> ship. Depends on (and auto-installs) compound-v + bad-research from this same marketplace.

plugins.name: compound-v
plugins.description: Lean skill set for shipping software with agentic AI: product & startup taste, context engineering, security-first review, TDD, no-overkill workflow. The superpowers replacement prd-pipeline composes.

plugins.name: bad-research
plugins.description: Deep, multi-source, fully-cited research engine (tier-adaptive, adversarially reviewed). Vendored real engine: prompt skills + 16 agents load instantly; the Python `bad` CLI self-bootstraps on first use (needs Python 3.11-3.13 + uv/pipx).
